concerts.title: Thiruppavai pasurams 1-15
concerts.description: First half of Andal's 30-pasuram cycle. Coherent by author+cycle, cuts across ragas.

concerts.title: Thiruppavai pasurams 16-30
concerts.description: Second half of Andal's cycle. Leave-out tests should recover pasurams from the other half.

concerts.title: Dikshitar Navavarnam
concerts.description: Dikshitar's 9 krithis praising Kamakshi — each in a different raga. Canonical cycle.

concerts.title: Tyagaraja Pancharatna Krithis
concerts.description: Tyagaraja's 4 greatest compositions, always performed together at Thyagaraja Aradhana. Full canonical set.

concerts.title: Invocations to Ganapati
concerts.description: Songs praising Ganesha across ragas and composers. Devotional theme is the only common thread.

concerts.title: Rama bhakti
concerts.description: Songs on Lord Rama — Tyagaraja wrote many, others contributed.

concerts.title: Devi / Shakti krithis
concerts.description: Songs praising the goddess in her many forms. Excludes Navavarnam.

concerts.title: Tyagaraja in the 5 heavy ragas
concerts.description: Tyagaraja krithis in Thodi, Bhairavi, Shankarabharanam, Kalyani, Kharaharapriya.

concerts.title: Dikshitar sampler
concerts.description: Range of Dikshitar compositions excluding Navavarnam.

concerts.title: Kalyani ragam (control)
concerts.description: All Kalyani songs. Same-raga control — tests whether CF adds value over property filtering.

concerts.title: Bhairavi ragam (control)
concerts.description: All Bhairavi songs. Same-raga control — tests whether CF adds value over property filtering.

concerts.title: Thodi ragam (control)
concerts.description: All Thodi songs. Same-raga control — tests whether CF adds value over property filtering.

segments.name: Shree Kamalaambike Shive
segments.songKey: Shree Kamalaambike Shive||Dikshitar ( Navavarnam Mangala Krithi )

segments.name: Pahi Rama Doota
segments.songKey: Pahi Rama Doota||Tyagaraja. Learnt From Recording of: C.V.Shankar

segments.name: Pahimaam Sri RajaRajeshwari
segments.songKey: Pahimaam Sri RajaRajeshwari||Maha Vaidyanatha Iyer. Learnt From Recording of: Semmangudi
